title: AYETASKS
description: Comprehensive daily task management mobile app featuring sub-task support and advanced scheduling.
shortDescription: Swift task manager with FastAPI and MongoDB backend
details: Native iOS application designed for granular task management. Features a robust backend architecture using Python (FastAPI) and MongoDB to handle complex data relationships like sub-tasks and recurring schedules, ensuring a responsive and native user experience.

title: AYERECIPES
description: Cloud-native recipe management platform with containerized backend and scalable media storage.
shortDescription: Swift recipe app with FastAPI, Docker and AWS S3
details: Scalable iOS app for recipe management. The backend is containerized with Docker for consistent deployment and leverages MongoDB Atlas for data handling and AWS S3 for efficient cloud media storage, representing a production-ready cloud architecture.

title: MEDISCANN
description: Cross-platform mobile application for dermatological disease detection using a custom-trained MobileNetV2 AI model.
shortDescription: AI-powered dermatological analysis app with MobileNetV2
details: A comprehensive system composed of a React Native mobile client (Expo), a React web dashboard for administration, and a Python-based AI backend. The core features a convolutional neural network (MobileNetV2) exposed via a REST API (Flask/FastAPI) to classify dermatological conditions from user images in real-time. The entire architecture is containerized and orchestrated using Docker Compose.
